productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Turquoise Blue Wallet
description: High on practicality and ease of use, this wallet from lino perros comes with loads of space to hold your cards and your money safe.Made of leather with card slots and organiser pouches on either side that is secured by clasp button flapsOne main zippered compartmentTwo open organiser pouches on either side of the main compartmentCareWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust
